message:
feat(unicode): Add NFC/NFD normalization module

New src/unicode/normalize.rs provides:
- normalize_nfc(): Convert text to canonical composition form
- normalize_nfd(): Convert text to canonical decomposition form
- is_normalized_nfc(): Check if text is already NFC normalized
- compare_normalized(): Compare strings after NFC normalization

Uses unicode-normalization crate. Includes tests for combining
characters (e + combining acute → é) and round-trip preservation.

Update mod.rs to export the new module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
